name: memeloop-node
description: MemeLoop CLI compute node: register, start, status.

scripts.build: tsup src/cli.ts src/index.ts src/runtime/index.ts src/config.ts src/terminal/index.ts src/knowledge/index.ts src/network/index.ts src/auth/index.ts src/im/createImWebhookHandler.ts --format cjs --dts --sourcemap --external @modelcontextprotocol/sdk
scripts.test:e2e: pnpm --filter memeloop build && pnpm exec cucumber-js --config features/cucumber.config.js --exit
